basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 29-05-2026 on the official website www.nitrkl.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation up to 5 years in the case of candidates belonging to Schedule Castes / Schedule Tribes / PWD and Female applicants whereas 3 years in the case of OBCs (Non-creamy layer candidates).

qualification.details: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Botany / Plant Science / Plant Biotechnology / Plant Pathology / Agricultural Biotechnology / Allied Plant Science disciplines with 60% marks or 6.50 CGPA in 10 point scale. NET or valid GATE qualification.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
